scripts.pretest: node -e "const net=require('net');const checks=[['localhost',5173,'Dashboard'],['localhost',3002,'API'],['localhost',54321,'Supabase']];Promise.all(checks.map(([h,p,n])=>new Promise((res,rej)=>{const s=net.createConnection({host:h,port:p,timeout:2000},()=>{s.destroy();res()});s.on('error',()=>rej(new Error(n+' not running on port '+p)));s.on('timeout',()=>{s.destroy();rej(new Error(n+' timeout on port '+p))})}))).catch(e=>{console.error('FAIL: '+e.message+'\nStart services first: pnpm dev:container');process.exit(1)})"
